message:
feat(polyfills): Round 12 - chmod, chown, utimes, symlink, mkdtemp, copyFile, setuid

fs.zig:
- chmodSync/chownSync/lchownSync - file permissions and ownership
- utimesSync - modify file timestamps (atime/mtime)
- symlinkSync/readlinkSync/linkSync - symbolic and hard links
- mkdtempSync - create temp directory with unique suffix
- copyFileSync - native file copying with COPYFILE_EXCL support

process.zig:
- setuid/setgid/seteuid/setegid - process privilege management

os.zig:
- cpus() now returns real CPU speed via hw.cpufrequency sysctl

All implementations use POSIX syscalls. 21 tests passing.
